issues.title: Incorrect index name in Neo4j
issues.body:
Created index name is: spring-ai-document-index

But it seems it's uncommon to use - in names in Neo4j

DROP INDEX spring-ai-document-index
DROP INDEX 'spring-ai-document-index'
DROP INDEX "spring-ai-document-index"
doesn't work

comments.body: @ErykCh please check if this is resolved in M2 release.

I think this issue could be closed. @mnd999 gave the right solution already. It's unrelated to any code in the project because this is just how escaping of names in Neo4j works. The index creation code also uses the backticks for all names.
The only code solution(?)d we could provide is shortening the default name, but as soon as people start using dashes etc. again, they will have to deal with it again.

@mnd999 Thanks for the solution! @meistermeier Thanks for the review as well! 

@ErykCh Closing this as resolved. Please feel free to re-open if you still have any issues with this.
